We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 4.39s, d = 182.52m:
t^2 = 4.39 * 4.39:
4.39 * 0.09 = 0.3951
4.39 * 0.30 = 1.3170
4.39 * 4.00 = 17.5600
0.3951 + 1.3170 = 1.7121
1.7121 + 17.5600 = 19.2721
k = 182.52 / 4.39^2 = 182.52 / 19.2721 = 182.520 / 19.272
= 0 + 1 * 182520 / 19272
= 1 + 1 * 163248 / 19272
= 2 + 1 * 143976 / 19272
= 3 + 1 * 124704 / 19272
= 4 + 1 * 105432 / 19272
= 5 + 1 * 86160 / 19272
= 6 + 1 * 66888 / 19272
= 7 + 1 * 47616 / 19272
= 8 + 1 * 28344 / 19272
= 9 + 1 * 9072 / 19272
= 9.0 + 0.1 * 90720 / 19272
= 9.1 + 0.1 * 71448 / 19272
= 9.2 + 0.1 * 52176 / 19272
= 9.3 + 0.1 * 32904 / 19272
= 9.4 + 0.1 * 13632 / 19272
= 9.40 + 0.01 * 136320 / 19272
= 9.41 + 0.01 * 117048 / 19272
= 9.42 + 0.01 * 97776 / 19272
= 9.43 + 0.01 * 78504 / 19272
= 9.44 + 0.01 * 59232 / 19272
= 9.45 + 0.01 * 39960 / 19272
= 9.46 + 0.01 * 20688 / 19272
= 9.47 + 0.01 * 1416 / 19272
= 9.470 + 0.001 * 14160 / 19272
= 9.470

t = 3.11s, d = 91.6m:
t^2 = 3.11 * 3.11:
3.11 * 0.01 = 0.0311
3.11 * 0.10 = 0.3110
3.11 * 3.00 = 9.3300
0.0311 + 0.3110 = 0.3421
0.3421 + 9.3300 = 9.6721
k = 91.6 / 3.11^2 = 91.6 / 9.6721 = 91.600 / 9.672
= 0 + 1 * 91600 / 9672
= 1 + 1 * 81928 / 9672
= 2 + 1 * 72256 / 9672
= 3 + 1 * 62584 / 9672
= 4 + 1 * 52912 / 9672
= 5 + 1 * 43240 / 9672
= 6 + 1 * 33568 / 9672
= 7 + 1 * 23896 / 9672
= 8 + 1 * 14224 / 9672
= 9 + 1 * 4552 / 9672
= 9.0 + 0.1 * 45520 / 9672
= 9.1 + 0.1 * 35848 / 9672
= 9.2 + 0.1 * 26176 / 9672
= 9.3 + 0.1 * 16504 / 9672
= 9.4 + 0.1 * 6832 / 9672
= 9.40 + 0.01 * 68320 / 9672
= 9.41 + 0.01 * 58648 / 9672
= 9.42 + 0.01 * 48976 / 9672
= 9.43 + 0.01 * 39304 / 9672
= 9.44 + 0.01 * 29632 / 9672
= 9.45 + 0.01 * 19960 / 9672
= 9.46 + 0.01 * 10288 / 9672
= 9.47 + 0.01 * 616 / 9672
= 9.470 + 0.001 * 6160 / 9672
= 9.470

t = 1.21s, d = 13.87m:
t^2 = 1.21 * 1.21:
1.21 * 0.01 = 0.0121
1.21 * 0.20 = 0.2420
1.21 * 1.00 = 1.2100
0.0121 + 0.2420 = 0.2541
0.2541 + 1.2100 = 1.4641
k = 13.87 / 1.21^2 = 13.87 / 1.4641 = 13.870 / 1.464
= 0 + 1 * 13870 / 1464
= 1 + 1 * 12406 / 1464
= 2 + 1 * 10942 / 1464
= 3 + 1 * 9478 / 1464
= 4 + 1 * 8014 / 1464
= 5 + 1 * 6550 / 1464
= 6 + 1 * 5086 / 1464
= 7 + 1 * 3622 / 1464
= 8 + 1 * 2158 / 1464
= 9 + 1 * 694 / 1464
= 9.0 + 0.1 * 6940 / 1464
= 9.1 + 0.1 * 5476 / 1464
= 9.2 + 0.1 * 4012 / 1464
= 9.3 + 0.1 * 2548 / 1464
= 9.4 + 0.1 * 1084 / 1464
= 9.40 + 0.01 * 10840 / 1464
= 9.41 + 0.01 * 9376 / 1464
= 9.42 + 0.01 * 7912 / 1464
= 9.43 + 0.01 * 6448 / 1464
= 9.44 + 0.01 * 4984 / 1464
= 9.45 + 0.01 * 3520 / 1464
= 9.46 + 0.01 * 2056 / 1464
= 9.47 + 0.01 * 592 / 1464
= 9.470 + 0.001 * 5920 / 1464
= 9.471 + 0.001 * 4456 / 1464
= 9.472 + 0.001 * 2992 / 1464
= 9.473 + 0.001 * 1528 / 1464
= 9.474 + 0.001 * 64 / 1464
= 9.474

k values: 9.470, 9.470, 9.474
k values (sorted): 9.470, 9.470, 9.474
The median k is 9.470.

For t = 3.16:
t^2 = 3.16 * 3.16:
3.16 * 0.06 = 0.1896
3.16 * 0.10 = 0.3160
3.16 * 3.00 = 9.4800
0.1896 + 0.3160 = 0.5056
0.5056 + 9.4800 = 9.9856
= 9.9856

d = 9.47 * 9.9856:
9.47 * 0.0006 = 0.005682
9.47 * 0.0050 = 0.047350
9.47 * 0.0800 = 0.757600
9.47 * 0.9000 = 8.523000
9.47 * 9.0000 = 85.230000
0.005682 + 0.047350 = 0.053032
0.053032 + 0.757600 = 0.810632
0.810632 + 8.523000 = 9.333632
9.333632 + 85.230000 = 94.563632
= 94.563

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{94.563}
